forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 14.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 13.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:50am to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 12.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely in the afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, becoming less likely at night. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 12.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 13 and 17.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between zero and 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 10 and 14.

Cloudy. Areas of morning frost in the east. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 20.
Sun protection 10:40am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.

Becoming cloudy. Areas of morning frost. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between minus 1 and 3 above zero with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 15.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Areas of morning frost south of Hawker. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Sun protection 10:50am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 18 and 22.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sunny. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 20 to 25.
Sun protection 10:20am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 22.
Mostly sunny. Areas of morning frost south of Leigh Creek. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 1 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 18.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
